action_set_definitions.name: get_student_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of a student, including knowledge levels, engagement, fatigue, and session time.

student_name.description: The name of the student to query.

action_set_definitions.name: identify_prerequisite_deficit
action_set_definitions.description: Analyzes a knowledge profile to find the specific topic that serves as the primary foundational deficit for a target module.

target_module.description: The module the student aims to unlock.

knowledge_profile.description: The current mapping of topic masteries.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_learning_activity
action_set_definitions.description: Performs an instructional intervention. Increases mastery, fatigue, and session duration. Intensity affects the rate of these changes.

topic_id.description: The ID of the topic to teach.

intensity.description: Low: minimal fatigue, slow mastery gain. Medium: balanced. High: high fatigue, fast mastery gain.

action_set_definitions.name: administer_competency_test
action_set_definitions.description: Runs an adaptive diagnostic test. Takes exactly 8 minutes. Returns competency estimate and Standard Error of Measurement (SEM).

action_set_definitions.name: apply_engagement_intervention
action_set_definitions.description: Uses a motivational technique to restore student focus.

state_description.knowledge_profile: A mapping of topic IDs to mastery levels (float, 0.0 to 1.0).
state_description.learning_history: List of previously completed lesson or assessment IDs.
state_description.engagement_level: Current student focus and motivation level (0.0 to 1.0).
state_description.fatigue_level: Accumulated cognitive load; high fatigue reduces performance (0.0 to 1.0).
state_description.session_duration_mins: Total minutes spent in the current active learning session.
